allow:
Bash(ls /root/outbound-engine/ | sort
echo "---MODULES---"
ls /root/outbound-engine/modules/ | sort
echo "---TESTS---"
ls /root/outbound-engine/tests/ | sort
echo "---LOGS---"
ls /root/outbound-engine/logs/ 2>/dev/null || echo "[empty]")

Bash(echo "=== c1-lead-scraper module ===" && ls -la /root/outbound-engine/modules/c1-lead-scraper/ && echo "" && ls /root/outbound-engine/modules/c1-lead-scraper/logs/ 2>/dev/null && echo "=== m7-manychat-bridge module ===" && ls -la /root/outbound-engine/modules/m7-manychat-bridge/ && echo "" && echo "=== Checking for c1-lead-scraper spec ===" && ls /root/outbound-engine/*.md && echo "=== Checking logs directory ===" && ls /root/outbound-engine/logs/)
